pages.title: Spectre
pages.text: A Spectre is an aggressive spectral creature, hard to see and their chill touch goes straight through armor.

pages.title: Unique properties
pages.description: Using a $(l:kettle/kettle_intro#revealing)Brew of Revealing$(/l) reveals their true form.$(p)If a player summons a Spectre, they can spray a bit of $(resources/graveyard_dust)Graveyard Dust$(/l) over them to greatly increase their health.
pages._comment: Unlocked when player uses Brew of Revealing on a Spectre (TODO)
